"cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-321", "name": "Use of Hard-coded Cryptographic Key"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-798", "name": "Use of Hard-coded Credentials"}], "description": "### Impact
There is a hard-coded cryptographic key in the code base which can be exploited to run admin commands on a remote server, if you know the address and username of the admin. This effects the server (netmaker) component, and not clients.

### Patches
This has been patched in Netmaker v0.8.5, v0.9.4, and v0.10.0. If you are running these versions, the fix is to perform the following:

1. docker-compose down
2. docker pull gravitl/netmaker:( version )
3. docker-compose up -d

#### Additional Information
If you are running **any other version**, you will need to upgrade to one of these three versions. If you have a special circumstance that requires running a different version, let us know and we may be able to build a custom patch.

### For more information
If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:
* Email us at [info@gravitl.com](mailto:info@gravitl.com)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.01556, "percentile": 0.72275}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-86f3-hf24-76q4", "github_reviewed_at": "2022-02-22T19:40:23Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-86f3-hf24-76q4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-86f3-hf24-76q4"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2022-23650"}], "nvd_published_at": "2022-02-18T22:15:00Z", "published_at": "2022-02-22T19:40:23Z", "references": ["https://github.com/gravitl/netmaker/security/advisories/GHSA-86f3-hf24-76q4", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-23650", "https://github.com/gravitl/netmaker/pull/781/commits/1bec97c662670dfdab804343fc42ae4b1d050a87", "https://github.com/gravitl/netmaker/commit/3d4f44ecfe8be4ca38920556ba3b90502ffb4fee", "https://github.com/gravitl/netmaker/commit/e9bce264719f88c30e252ecc754d08f422f4c080", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-86f3-hf24-76q4"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/gravitl/netmaker/security-advisories/GHSA-86f3-hf24-76q4", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/gravitl/netmaker", "summary": "Use of Hard-coded Cryptographic Key in Netmaker", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T16:06:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-86f3-hf24-76q4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.8.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/gravitl/netmaker"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.8.5"}, {"first_patched_version": "0.9.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/gravitl/netmaker"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.9.0, < 0.9.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Use of Hard-coded Cryptographic Key in Netmaker
